subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Ba lumbulule bya kumwenako bya busendwe bitaanu pa byo batongola.
topics: Kusongwesha kishina kya mingilo( nyimbo,bishimpi,mashimikila} na maana a
kisemwa {bwilamizhi, bupopweshishe, byabamupashi, kashinshi ne busendwa}
Mufunjishi akambizhe bafunda kusongwesha kishina kya kupichila mu nyimbo,
